title: myoporum serratum var. subserratum
intro: Myoporum serratum var. subserratum, also known as Coast Boobialla, is a type of flowering plant native to Australia and parts of Asia. This shrub is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, such as skin infections, wounds, and respiratory issues, due to its ability to promote tissue repair, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The herbal preparations of Myoporum serratum var. subserratum include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
